ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prevalences" (
  "prevalence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prevalence entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state in which the prevalence is measured */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health condition */,
  "age_adjusted_prevalence" REAL /* Age-adjusted prevalence percentage */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prevalence */,
  "quartile" TEXT /* Quartile ranking of the prevalence */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prevalence data is collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source for the prevalence data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the prevalence data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prevalence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalences_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalences_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES health_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the health condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Whether the report is published or draft */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the report creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quartiles" (
  "quartile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quartile */,
  "quartile_range" TEXT /* Range definition for the quartile */,
  "quartile_label" TEXT /* Human-readable label for the quartile range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quartile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence interval entry */,
  "interval_description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence interval */,
  "interval_label" TEXT /* Human-readable label for the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)
